_readme: Render recipe (starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC). Tracks the generic pipeline; pin a knob here only with a measured, dataset-specific reason.

notes.solve: blind solve grinds on this narrow field (narrow-field index scales); solve with a position hint: solve_field.py --ra=270.8 --dec=-23.9 --radius-deg=10 (an offline narrow-field solver complement, BACKLOG, is the structural fix)
notes.spcc: SPCC runs sensor-null (the generic default). The strong R down-scale is the L-Pro passband on an Ha-rich field. Grounding SPCC in the real sensor/filter response is an immaterial refinement here (the star fit dominates); nothing pinned.
notes.filters: no FILTER keywords in any header: filter identity is directory-only; flats/ and darkflats/ are per-set staging symlinks (flats_lpro, biases)
